title: Pizza Hut Tests Fully Robotic Restaurant, Portending the Vending Machine-ified Future of the Pizzeria
text: When it comes to pizza, consumers may be ready for robotic restaurants. Pizza Hut now has a fully automated location at a mall in Bnei Dror, Israel, per a video shared on LinkedIn by Hyper Food Robotics, the tech company powering the location.

title: Toast Stock Price Predictions: The TOST Downgrade Turning Investors' Stomachs Today
text: TOST stock is falling hard after an analyst downgrade. Here's what investors should know about this stock's price predictions.

title: It's Time to Step into Yum! Brands Stock
text: Popular restaurant franchisor Yum! Brands (NYSE: YUM) stock has been selling off with the benchmark indexes despite strong earnings.

title: Yum Brands Is Moving In the Right Direction
text: Yum Brands, Inc. ( YUM , Financial), which owns well-known restaurant brands such as KFC, Pizza hut, Taco Bell and The Habit Burger Grill, has recovered well from the economic recession. The company claims ownership of around 50,000 restaurants in more than 150 countries and generates revenue from its own restaurants and franchise fees.

title: KFC, Burger King And McDonald's Offering More Vegan Options As Demand Rises

title: KFC, Beyond Meat chicken rollout on tap
text: Beyond Meat and KFC are teaming up to offer Beyond Fried Chicken, the chain's first-ever plant-based combo meal.

title: Beyond Meat permanently added to Canadian Pizza Hut menus
text: Beyond Meat Inc. BYND, -3.18% said Monday that it will become a permanent menu item at Pizza Hut locations across Canada. Beyond Italian Sausage Crumbles will be included on Great Beyond Pizza, Beyond Italian Sausage Alfredo Loaded Flatbread and Beyond Creamy Alfredo.

title: Pizza Hut adds Beyond Meat sausage to Canadian menus permanently
text: Pizza Hut restaurants in Canada are adding Beyond Meat's plant-based sausage to their menus permanently, starting Monday.

title: Pizza Hut Canada Adds Beyond Meat's Italian Sausage Crumbles As Permanent Menu Item
text: Beyond Meat Inc (NASDAQ: BYND) said its plant-based Beyond Italian Sausage Crumbles will be a permanent offering at Yum! Brands Inc (NYSE: YUM) subsidiary Pizza Hut's Canada locations nationwide.

title: Pizza Hut® and Beyond Meat® Strengthen Partnership With Debut of Beyond Italian Sausage™ Crumbles at Locations Across Canada
text: Following a successful test, Pizza Hut Canada is adding Beyond Italian Sausage Crumbles as a permanent menu item to meet growing consumer demand for plant-based protein Following a successful test, Pizza Hut Canada is adding Beyond Italian Sausage Crumbles as a permanent menu item to meet growing consumer demand for plant-based protein

title: Could Beyond Meat Be In For A Reversal After KFC Debut?
text: Beyond Meat Inc. (NASDAQ:BYND) shares are trading higher on continued momentum after the company announced the debut of Beyond Fried Chicken. KFC restaurants across the U.S. will offer Beyond Fried Chicken for a limited time, while supplies last.

title: Taco Bell takes taco subscription program nationwide
text: Taco Bell announced the nationwide launch of the Taco Lover's Pass, a taco subscription service that has been piloted in Tucson, Ariz. since September 2021.

title: Taco Bell launches taco-a-day subscription program nationwide to drive visits
text: The pass costs around $10 a month, depending on the location.

title: BYND Stock: 11 Things for Plant-Based Investors to Know About the KFC Beyond Meat ‘Fried Chicken' News
text: Beyond Meat (BYND) stock is on the move today as investors react to news of Yum Brand's (YUM) KFC adopting plant-based fried chicken. The post BYND Stock: 11 Things for Plant-Based Investors to Know About the KFC Beyond Meat ‘Fried Chicken' News appeared first on InvestorPlace.

title: Options Traders Blast Beyond Meat Stock on KFC Buzz
text: The shares of Beyond Meat Inc   (NASDAQ:BYND) are surging today, last seen up 5.1% to trade at $64.75, after Yum Brands' (YUM) KFC said it would start offering plant-based fried chicken on Jan. 10 in restaurants across the United States, for a limited period of time.

title: Beyond Meat soars after deal to launch plant-based chicken at KFC nationwide
text: The product launches for Beyond Meat have yet to reverse the decline in its stock price, which fell 48% in 2021.

title: Give Back and Throwback in the New Year with the BOOK IT!® Bundle from Pizza Hut
text: PLANO, Texas, Jan. 5, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Beginning today, Pizza Hut is offering the BOOK IT! Bundle, the perfect way to feed the whole family while accomplishing New Year's resolutions to give back.

title: KFC's new menu item tastes like chicken (but isn't)
text: Kentucky Fried Chicken is going to sell a new menu item that contains no chicken — but tastes like it does.
